description: Privileged bridge that injects sender-initial avatars into the about:3pane message list.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Begin observing all mail windows and inject avatars using the given config.

functions.name: updateConfig
functions.description: Push updated config to every injected message list (no restart).

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Disconnect observers and remove all injected avatars and styles.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired when injection encounters a recoverable error.
